lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Tenth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨ ਮੋਹੀ ਪੰਚ ਦੋਹੀ ਉਰਝਿ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਬਸਿਓ ਤਾਕੀ ਸਰਨਿ ਸਾਧੂਆ ਦੂਤ ਸੰਗੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maan mohee panch dohee urajh nikatt basio taakee saran saadhooaa doot sang nivaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Enticed by pride, entrapped and plundered by the five thieves, still, you live near them. I have come to the Sanctuary of the Holy, and I have been rescued from my association with those demons. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੋ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਜੀ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਜਾਤ ਜੀਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aiso daan dehu jee santahu jaat jeeo balihaar |
lines.english: Give me that blessing, O Dear Saints, for which my soul would be a sacrifice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਜੋਨਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿਓ ਹਾਰਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਦੁਆਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kott janam jon bhramio haar pario duaar |1|
lines.english: I wandered through millions of lifetimes and incarnations. I am so very tired - I have fallen at God's Door. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਈ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kirapaa gobind bhee milio naam adhaar |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe has become Kind to me; He has blessed me with the Support of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਲਭ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਵ ਉਤਾਰਿ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੨॥੧॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: dulabh janam safal naanak bhav utaar paar |2|1|45|
lines.english: This precious human life has become fruitful and prosperous; O Nanak, I am carried across the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||1||45||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Eleventh House:
He Himself has come to me, in His Natural Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਸੁਖ ਬਾਲੇ ਭੋਲੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabh milio sukh baale bhole |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have met God through innocent faith, and He has blessed me with peace. ||1||Pause||
I know nothing, and I show nothing.
By the good fortune of my destiny, I have joined the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
I do not go out anywhere; I dwell in my own home.
God, the Treasure of Virtue, has been revealed in this body-robe. ||1||
In the places and interspaces, He is All-pervading.
With loving joy and excitement, Nanak speaks His Praises. ||2||1||46||
I have fallen in love with His Feet; I have abandoned everything else.
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:
It is so hard to meet the Lord of the Universe, my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮਿਤਿ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਗੰਮ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paramit roop agam agochar rahio sarab samaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His Form is Immeasurable, Inaccessible and Unfathomable; He is All-pervading everywhere. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਨਿ ਭਵਨਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਪਾਇਓ ਪਾਇਓ ਅਨਿਕ ਉਕਤਿ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kehan bhavan naahee paaeo paaeo anik ukat chaturaaee |1|
lines.english: By speaking and wandering, nothing is gained; nothing is obtained by clever tricks and devices. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਇਆਰ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਰ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਰੇਨਾਈ ॥੨॥੨॥੪੭॥
lines.translit: prabhoo deaar kripaar kripaa nidh jan naanak sant renaaee |2|2|47|
lines.english: God is Kind and Compassionate, the Treasure of Mercy; servant Nanak is the dust of the feet of the Saints. ||2||2||47||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤਨ ਜਤਨ ਅਨਿਕ ਉਪਾਵ ਰੇ ਤਉ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਜਉ ਕਿਰਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jatan jatan anik upaav re tau milio jau kirapaaee |
lines.english: People try all sorts of things, but the Lord is only met when He shows His Mercy.
O mother, I meditate on the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam.
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:
Without God, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਵਉ ਚਰਨਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਸਾਸਨ ਨਿਸਿ ਭੋਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chitvau charanaarabind saasan nis bhor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I remember His Lotus Feet with every breath, night and day. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਕੀਨ ਆਪਨ ਤੂਟਤ ਨਹੀ ਜੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: laae preet keen aapan toottat nahee jor |
lines.english: He loves me and makes me His Own; my union with Him shall never be broken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਸਰਬਸੋੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਨਿਧੇ ਸੁਖ ਮੋਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: praan man dhan sarabaso har gun nidhe sukh mor |1|
lines.english: He is my breath of life, mind, wealth and everything. The Lord is the Treasure of Virtue and Peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਤ ਊਤ ਰਾਮ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਨਿਰਖਤ ਰਿਦ ਖੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eet aoot raam pooran nirakhat rid khor |
lines.english: Here and hereafter, the Lord is perfectly pervading; He is seen deep within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਰਨ ਤਰਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨਸਿਓ ਦੁਖੁ ਘੋਰ ॥੨॥੩॥੪੮॥
lines.translit: sant saran taran naanak binasio dukh ghor |2|3|48|
lines.english: In the Sanctuary of the Saints, I am carried across; O Nanak, the terrible pain has been taken away. ||2||3||48||
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨੋ ਤੂ ਮੀਤੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੇਹੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saajano too meet meraa grihi terai sabh kehu |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are my Friend, my very best Friend; everything is in Your Home. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨੁ ਮਾਂਗਉ ਤਾਨੁ ਮਾਂਗਉ ਧਨੁ ਲਖਮੀ ਸੁਤ ਦੇਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: maan maangau taan maangau dhan lakhamee sut deh |1|
lines.english: I beg for honor, I beg for strength; please bless me with wealth, property and children. ||1||
God's humble servant is in love with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਭੁਗਤਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦ ਪਰਮ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: mukat jugat bhugat pooran paramaanand param nidhaan |
lines.english: You are the Technology of liberation, the Way to worldly success, the Perfect Lord of Supreme Bliss, the Transcendent Treasure.
